text:
On Wed, 1 Nov 2000, Justin T. Gibbs wrote:

> I would not recommend using 4.1.1R if you have an Adaptec controller.
> Please try 4.1-stable or a 4.2 release candidate when one
> becomes available and let me know if your problems persist.

Thanks.
As I had written in the follow-up, I got it working sometime later.

 
cheers,
Rainer
